meaning: vt.履行,执行,表演,演出v.完成任务
examples: I'm looking forward to seeing you perform.
Thousands of people paid good money to watch the band perform.
A computer can perform many tasks at once.
Mr. FAIUMU: When we perform live, we don't actually have a live rhythm section.
There is no risk to British taxpayers of seeing the IMF perform its proper role.
